title: git-dumper: A tool to dump a git repository from a website
summary_snippet: This tool downloads a full git repository from a web server, even if directory listing is disabled, by intelligently discovering and fetching git objects and references.

title: Claude Code Advanced Patterns: Subagents, MCP, and Scaling to Real Codebases
summary_snippet: A resource summary and webinar overview from Anthropic regarding advanced implementation patterns for Claude Code, focusing on subagents and the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
